description: An asset manager wants to optimize the inventory of critical spare parts (e.g., inverters, transformers) across their portfolio to minimize costs while ensuring availability.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the historical failure rate and lead time for replacement for each critical component.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles failure rate and lead time data for all critical spares.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the cost of holding each spare part in inventory versus the cost of downtime if a spare is not available.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent quantifies the cost-benefit tradeoff for each part.

nodes.task_description: Recommend the optimal number of each spare part to hold in a central warehouse to meet a 98% availability target at the lowest cost.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a list of recommended inventory levels for each critical part.
